name: Practitioner registration confirmation
description: Sent to a practitioner after their directory registration is received.
subject: We received your practitioner registration
text: Hi {{submitterName}},\n\nThank you for your practitioner registration. Our team will review your details and contact you with the next steps.
html:
Hi {{submitterName}},

Thank you for your practitioner registration. Our team will review your details and contact you with the next steps.

name: Trainer contact confirmation
description: Sent to the visitor with trainer contact details.
subject: Contact details for {{trainerName}}

name: Practitioner contact notification
description: Sent to the practitioner or EFTMRA team when a visitor requests practitioner contact details.
subject: New practitioner contact request: {{practitionerName}}
html:
New contact request for {{practitionerName}}.

  • Name: {{requesterName}}
  • Email: {{requesterEmail}}
  • Phone: {{requesterPhone}}

Please contact the requester directly.

name: Practitioner contact confirmation
description: Sent to the visitor with practitioner contact details.
subject: Contact details for {{practitionerName}}

name: Trainer contact notification
description: Sent to the trainer or EFTMRA team when a visitor contacts a trainer.
subject: New trainer contact request: {{trainerName}}

name: Training registration notification
description: Sent to the EFTMRA team when a visitor registers for a training.
availableVariables: trainingTitle, trainingSlug, requesterName, requesterEmail, requesterPhone, city, background, source, notes
subject: New training registration: {{trainingTitle}}

name: Simple form notification
description: Shared admin notification template used by all public website forms.
availableVariables: formName, submitterName, submitterEmail, submitterPhone, source, message
subject: New {{formName}} submission
html:
A new {{formName}} form was submitted.

Name: {{submitterName}}
Email: {{submitterEmail}}
Phone: {{submitterPhone}}
Source: {{source}}

{{message}}

name: Training registration confirmation
description: Sent to the visitor after a training registration is received.
subject: We received your registration for {{trainingTitle}}
text: Hi {{requesterName}},\n\nThank you for registering for {{trainingTitle}}. Our team will review your details and contact you with the next steps.
html:
Hi {{requesterName}},

Thank you for registering for {{trainingTitle}}. Our team will review your details and contact you with the next steps.

name: Simple form confirmation
description: Shared submitter confirmation template used by public website forms that collect an email address.
subject: We received your {{formName}} submission
text: Hi {{submitterName}},\n\nThank you for your {{formName}} submission. Our team will review it and contact you with the next steps.
html:
Hi {{submitterName}},

Thank you for your {{formName}} submission. Our team will review it and contact you with the next steps.
